chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D- 119 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of CMA No. 2546/2024 (Contempt). 03-10-2024. Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Dareshani Ali Hyder “Ada” Deputy Attorney General along with Muhammad Rashid DG PWD and Muhammad Adnan Rashid CAO, Pakistan PWD. ******** In compliance of the Court order dated 06-03-2024, the respondent No. 2 is present and states that delay in appointment of the petitioner under the Prime Minister Assistance Package is neither for issuance of succession Certificate nor for want of any additional documents, but Hon’ble Islamabad High Court has passed order on 08-12-2022 in Writ Petition No. 1146/2022 that the grant of employment to the son/daughter is discriminatory and against the various guarantees given by the Constitution, therefore, the Establishment Division and the Prime Minister office were restrained from processing further case for the grant of appointments under Prime Minister Assistance Package. We do not see such an observation hinder the case of the petitioner, to which, respondent No.2 undertakes that case of the petitioner shall be implemented in letter and spirit, such undertaking is accepted and respondents are directed to make compliance of this Court’s order within 15 days and file a compliance report. With these directions, the instant CMA is disposed of. Judge Judge Nasim/P.A
